processing_steps: Query claims_history for this patient_member_id and provider_npi (last 30 days)
Check for duplicate claims with same CPT in 30-day window
Calculate frequency anomalies (total claims in 30 days, total in 365 days)
Check bundling rules for CPT combinations
Detect billing anomalies using IQR statistical method
Calculate fraud_score using configuration from fraud_detection_config
Assign risk_flag based on score thresholds
